news.headline: 'I never heard of the Strait of Hormuz before this': How one medical supply CEO is navigating the oil price shock
news.summary: Medical supply company Gentell sources raw materials from around the world, and the crisis at the Strait of Hormuz is causing volatility for its business.

news.headline: Americans are 'entrenched' in financial stress amid debt and price pressures
news.summary: Inflation and high debt levels continue cause financial anxiety for many Americans. Nonprofits can help with debt mangement.
